answer: $$\Theta_{k,l}(\mathcal{C}_2)=\begin{cases}0, & \text{if } k \text{ and } l \text{ are odd},\\[10pt]\frac{(k+l+2)(3l+k+4)}{8}, & \text{if } k \text{ and } l \text{ are even},\\[10pt]-\frac{(k+1)(k+2l+3)}{8}, & \text{if } k \text{ is odd and } l \text{ is even},\\[10pt]-\frac{(l+1)(3l+2k+5)}{8}, & \text{if } k \text{ is even and } l \text{ is odd}.\end{cases}$$
